reviews.review_msg: Don't do it. Just don't. Took BPK 303 with him a few semesters ago, and wrote a review (it disappeared, how convenient right?) lectures are full of studies, with no actual notes. Just rambles on about the studies. Doesn't tell you the format of the exam. Its a guessing game with him. Doesn't take feedback, stuck in his own ways.

he's passionate about the material but doesn't know how to teach. just makes jokes and tells stories during lecture. his powerpoints don't help with the exams and worst of all, the lab reports can be unclear of what's expected. would not recommend

The labs were absolutely ridiculous, they were not relevant and they were graded so nitpicky that no matter what you fixed they would just pick a new thing to have a problem with. She says alot of absolutes that are not always necessarily true such as having a bad posture isn't bad...? The exams are fair. Hard class at 8:30 am.

I have never seen an individual take such simple concepts and convolute them into utter nonsense. Do not take a course with her unless you are prepared to kiss your GPA goodbye. Labs are nothing short of silly. 830 lectures with no recordings, and good luck without them. Expectations are simply unrealistic for the delivery of content.
Honestly, she is one the nicest person to teach. She tries to engage with the class and makes an effort of making lectures interesting.

Liane is a great prof. For the buffoon who said u have to "pay attention in class" - what else are u supposed to do? Play Clash Royale? Best prof I had in university. I am not really a smart student and yet I was able to get a decent grade. Questions were written because you need to apply the material, which is reasonable and not difficult to do.

For 143: For a first year course, she marked way too hard and didn't give enough 
/clear instructions for the term paper which was worth 20% of our grade. This was supposed to be a fun course, but the exams and term paper made it hell 👎🏻

shes a nice person but she made the course much harder then it needed to be. the midterm and final were strictly written and her slides had minimal writing so you had to pay attention in class. she doesn't post any lecture recordings or allows u to record her voice during lecture and 70% of her slides are just research articles which was a waste

Only teaches one class and I see why. Made us write weekly lab reports during 3 weeks when labs were canceled (strike) so we had to figure it out ourselves. Just reads his boring lecture slides and expects you to write the EXACT wording from slides for exam definitions and marks off if you write in your own words.
2/5 only cause he dresses stylish
